pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:12-95 sets PROJECT_DIR=/home/ga/scheduler-bot, creates bot.py/Dockerfile/docker-compose there, and launches the compose stack from that path.
setup_task.sh:77-95 writes docker-compose.yml with container_name 'scheduler-bot' and starts docker compose up -d --build so the running service uses that name.
task.json description lines 2-6 state that the bot logs UTC instead of the required 'America/New_York' timezone and explicitly instruct the agent to set TZ to America/New_York.
setup_task.sh:37-40 creates bot.py that prints PROCESSING_USER: Raphaël and STATUS: SUCCESS, so 'Raphaël' is the Unicode user the service must process.

privileged_info_summary: setup_task.sh builds a synthetic scheduler bot under /home/ga/scheduler-bot (bot.py, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml) and launches it via docker compose so the task state is entirely generated locally.
